title: Gastronomy Works
description: Adding various cooking recipes to Immersive Engineering!
body:
A small addon to Immersive Engineering which adds a variety of food items.

All foods added rely on industrial processing to make them, primarily using the mixer and bottling machine.

Dough is mixed, then poured into molds and finally baked, thus requiring a full production line to make, to appeal to users who love automation!

Currently, the list of foods includes:
- Baguette
- Bread Rolls    
- Sourdough Bread & Rolls
- Milk Bread
- Cake, topped with Custard
- Mixed Stew, to be canned
